top_weaknesses.issue: Three paragraphs over 80 words on mobile (84 / 95 / 81). The 95-word 'multiplier is brutal' paragraph (line cook -> mechanic chain) is the worst wall.
top_weaknesses.fix: Split the 95-word para after 'all downstream of that decile's discretionary income.' Trim the Econ 101 explainer in the second half.

top_weaknesses.issue: 'Early signal' section is indicator-bingo (white-collar openings, CS unemployment, entry-level postings, ServiceNow ARR, payroll-tax receipts, SF/Seattle/Austin housing) without a clean causal chain — reads like a deck/dashboard rather than an essay.
top_weaknesses.fix: Add H3s grouping the indicators (Labor / Enterprise / Fiscal / Housing) and drop one or two of the weakest stats; tie each cluster back to the top-decile mechanism in one sentence.

top_weaknesses.issue: Several phrases tip into deck-dunking / pundit cadence ('cheerful AI productivity decks leave out', 'The multiplier is brutal', 'You can already see the leading edge', 'reads the same signal' x3, 'asset-price echo', 'polite framing... arithmetic is') — pings the AI-slop sensor.
top_weaknesses.fix: Cut or replace at least four of these; vary the 'reads X through Y' motif so it appears once, not three times.

top_weaknesses.issue: Anchor texts '7.0% unemployment' and 'Citrini Research's 2028 scenario' are bare-stat or generic; final H2 'What this means for anyone budgeting toward 2028' is wordy and slightly generic.
top_weaknesses.fix: Re-anchor as 'CS-grad unemployment hits 7.0%' and 'Citrini's 2028 displacement model'; sharpen H2 to e.g. 'If you sell to the top decile, model this as structural'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Asserted elasticity ('2% job loss -> 3-4% discretionary decline') is treated as fact without a primary citation beyond Citrini.
top_weaknesses.fix: Either qualify ('Citrini estimates...') or add one BEA/Fed source link to anchor the elasticity outside the scenario doc.

consensus_summary: The thesis (top 10% are the load-bearing wall, AI displacement breaks the demand half of its own thesis) is strong and the closing question lands; SEO scores it 8 on structure. Mobile and ICP score it down for three over-long paragraphs and an indicator-salad signals section that reads more like a deck than an earned argument.
